texto: A nation may be born in a day, but the great truths which make for the glory and uplift of the race only through long ages permeate and control humanity. We must have the divine patience and understand the divine mathematics of a thousand years as one day.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Josiah Brewer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “A nation may be born in a day, but the great truths which make for the glory and uplift of the ra…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, day, great, útil em momentos de great e mathematics.

texto: The phonograph and kinetoscope may some day seize and perpetuate all save the magnetic touch, but that weird, illusive, indefinable yet wonderfully real power by which the orator subdues may never be caught by science or preserved for the cruel dissecting knife of the critic.
explicacao: Citação de David Josiah Brewer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The phonograph and kinetoscope may some day seize and perpetuate all save the magnetic touch, but…” articula reflexao, day, power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como power e weird.

texto: Oratory is the masterful art. Poetry, painting, music, sculpture, architecture please, thrill, inspire - but oratory rules. The orator dominates those who hear him, convinces their reason, controls their judgment, compels their action. For the time being, he is master.
explicacao: Citação de David Josiah Brewer sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Oratory is the masterful art. Poetry, painting, music, sculpture, architecture please, thrill, in…” articula motivacao, time, art em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e art.
